summary: P2 bug fix verification complete. All bug fixes verified working: 1) Monster Lookup now uses local MONSTER_DATABASE instead of broken API - search for 'Goblin' returns results correctly, 2) Combat Creator monster list now shows all 303 monsters (removed slice(0,100) limit), 3) Previous P1 bug fixes still working - Level Up flow, Edit Character, HP clamping. Landing page improvements verified - white text on foggy glass panels and correct pricing tiers.

P2-001.title: Monster Lookup returns results
P2-001.description: Monster Lookup now uses local MONSTER_DATABASE instead of calling non-existent API endpoint. Searching for 'Goblin' returns results correctly.
P2-001.verification: Test searches for 'Goblin' and verifies results appear with CR badges

P2-002.title: Combat Creator shows all 303 monsters
P2-002.description: Removed slice(0,100) from CombatCreatorTab.js - monster list now shows full 303 monsters
P2-002.verification: Test verifies 'Monster Database (303)' button and 'of 303 monsters' text are visible

LANDING-001.title: White text on foggy glass panels
LANDING-001.description: Landing page text is now white (#ffffff) with darker glass panels (rgba(15,10,30,0.85)) for better visibility
LANDING-001.verification: Test verifies 'KEEPER' title and 'Sign In' button are visible

LANDING-002.title: Correct pricing tiers
LANDING-002.description: Pricing shows Player £3.99, Hero £3.99, Quest Master £3.99, Legendary £5.99
LANDING-002.verification: Test verifies all four tier names are visible on landing page

previous_bugs_still_fixed.BUG-1: Level Up flow shows HP roll UI correctly
previous_bugs_still_fixed.BUG-2: Edit Character button navigates to edit page with data
previous_bugs_still_fixed.BUG-3: HP clamping in frontend ensures HP never displays above max_hp

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user and campaign
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P2 bug fixes verified. Monster Lookup now uses local MONSTER_DATABASE (303 monsters) instead of API. Combat Creator shows all 303 monsters without the previous 100-item limit. Landing page has improved visibility with white text on foggy glass panels. Pricing tiers: Player £3.99 (Coming Soon), Hero £3.99, Quest Master £3.99 (Most Popular), Legendary £5.99. Test credentials: lcblakey24@outlook.com / LCBlakey24?!
